testcase.name: test_create_listing_deducts_fee
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_listing_fee.py:233: in test_create_listing_deducts_fee assert new_balance == initial_balance - 200, f"Expected balance {initial_balance - 200}, got {new_balance}" E AssertionError: Expected balance 300, got 400 E assert 400 == (500 - 200)

testcase.name: test_create_service_deducts_fee
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_listing_fee.py:502: in test_create_service_deducts_fee assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 400: {"detail":"Insufficient BL coins. You need 200 BL coins to create a listing. Current balance: 0"} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_rental_deducts_fee
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_listing_fee.py:564: in test_create_rental_deducts_fee assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 400: {"detail":"Insufficient BL coins. You need 200 BL coins to create a listing. Current balance: 0"} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
